quicksight.template.axislabeloptions.Cfn: The label options for a chart axis. You must specify the field that the label is targeted to.

quicksight.template.axislabeloptions.App.Description: The options that indicate which field the label belongs to.

quicksight.template.axislabeloptions.Cus.Description: The text for the axis label.

quicksight.template.axislabeloptions.Fon.Description: The font configuration of the axis label.
